jsonImport.title: Import data for this entity
jsonImport.description: Paste a partial or complete JSON payload to quickly fill supported fields, without managing photos or creating child entities.
jsonImport.disabledUntilSave: Save this entity before importing JSON.

messages.success: JSON applied. Reload or check the tabs if needed.

help.title: Accepted format
help.partial: A partial JSON only updates the fields it contains.
help.merge: Localized values are merged by language, unless replaceExisting or mode: replace is used.
help.accessConditions: For park items, accessConditions can create or update conditions and their reusable types.
